title: INERRA Artificial Flower Carnation Picks - Pack of 100 - For Floral Foam Tributes, Letters and Funeral Arrangements (Royal Blue)
features: Inerra Brand, Artificial Carnation Picks in a pack of 100
Each pick features a barbed stem, which is easily inserted into floral foam and funeral foam letters
Suitable for funeral foam letters, floral tributes and funeral florists arrangements
Each flower head measures 8cm x 7cm approximately. The total product length with the stem is 10cm.
